title: Tropics
description: A mod about palm trees and coconuts!
body:
![A palm tree](https://github.com/maximmods/Tropics/assets/62370320/d492923a-cb58-4255-941f-ccc954faf2b1)

# About

*Tropics is an little mod about about palm trees and coconuts for Fabric & Quilt 1.20-1.20.1.*

**[Fabric API][fapi] or [QFAPI / QSL][qsl] is required.**

![Created for ModFest: Singularity](https://blob.jortage.com/blobs/5/d4d/5d4d14d96db2e2024d87cf5606cb7ce6421633a002e328947f85d210ba250ecb9f86de8df210dd031be2d4eafb0980494e7a1e8e99590a550abaa42d82768b9f)

# FAQ

**Q: Forge port?**  
**A: *No*.** Quite simply, I don't like developing for Forge. 
Fabric & Quilt is a much easier platform for me to develop for,
I do this as a hobby and for fun.
but *if it's not fun, why bother?*

[fapi]: https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api
[qsl]: https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl
